mapper.sql: id, user_id, notification_id, is_read, read_time, created_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO msg_user_notification (user_id, notification_id, is_read, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.notificationId}, #{item.isRead}, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE msg_user_notification SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
